blocks.goal: Reduce size and complexity of the InBody state by extracting its processing logic and helper methods into a dedicated handler class.

ops.details: Create org.jsoup.parser.HtmlTreeBuilderStateInBodyHandler with static methods: processInBody(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb), inBodyStartTag(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb), inBodyEndTag(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb), anyOtherEndTag(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb), inBodyEndTagAdoption(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb), and the private constant MaxStackScan. Move the InBody enum's full processing implementation and its private helpers into this class. Keep signatures using Token and HtmlTreeBuilder and reuse Element/Tag/TokeniserState/etc. Preserve behavior: the new class uses the same package org.jsoup.parser and imports as needed. The original enum's InBody override is replaced with a single call: return HtmlTreeBuilderStateInBodyHandler.processInBody(t, tb);

Update the InBody enum element in HtmlTreeBuilderState to delegate to HtmlTreeBuilderStateInBodyHandler.processInBody(Token, HtmlTreeBuilder). Ensure references to moved private helpers are updated to call the static methods on the new handler class.

blocks.goal: Extract the InSelect state (and its closely related InSelectInTable helper 'anythingElse') into a dedicated select handler to reduce the enum's size and isolate select-specific complexity.

ops.details: Create org.jsoup.parser.HtmlTreeBuilderStateSelectHandler with static methods: processInSelect(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb) and a private anythingElse(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb). Move the entire body of the InSelect enum state's process implementation into processInSelect, and move the helper anythingElse used by InSelect and InSelectInTable. Keep behavior identical. Place the new class in the same package and import required types.

Change the InSelect enum element to delegate to HtmlTreeBuilderStateSelectHandler.processInSelect(Token, HtmlTreeBuilder). Update InSelectInTable to call the new handler's anythingElse method (or continue delegating to processInSelect when appropriate).

blocks.goal: Move the ForeignContent state's processing (including processAsHtml helper) into a dedicated handler class to isolate foreign-content parsing logic.

ops.details: Create org.jsoup.parser.HtmlTreeBuilderStateForeignContentHandler with static methods: processForeignContent(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb) and processAsHtml(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb). Move the ForeignContent enum state's process implementation and its processAsHtml helper to these static methods. Maintain the same namespace and imports.

Update the ForeignContent enum constant to delegate to HtmlTreeBuilderStateForeignContentHandler.processForeignContent(Token, HtmlTreeBuilder). Ensure calls that previously used the internal processAsHtml now call the handler's static processAsHtml method.

blocks.goal: Extract the InTemplate state's processing into a focused handler to reduce enum size and keep template-specific transitions and logic separate.

ops.details: Create org.jsoup.parser.HtmlTreeBuilderStateTemplateHandler with a static method processInTemplate(Token t, HtmlTreeBuilder tb). Move the entire InTemplate enum state's process implementation into that method. Keep any small helper logic local to the new class. Retain package and imports.
Update the InTemplate enum element to delegate to HtmlTreeBuilderStateTemplateHandler.processInTemplate(Token, HtmlTreeBuilder).
